title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 24 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 24 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/01/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued to fluctuate upward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at803 yuan/mt, up 0.69% for the day. Few offers were made by traders.
